steps.title: Call workflow audit
steps.body: We map how your calls work today — who calls, why, and when a human needs to step in.

steps.title: Knowledge setup
steps.body: We load your FAQs, services, hours, policies, and escalation rules.

steps.title: System integration
steps.body: We connect your phone line, calendar, CRM, SMS, and email.

steps.title: Test calls
steps.body: We run realistic calls before launch — bookings, FAQs, urgent and noisy callers.

steps.title: Go live & improve
steps.body: The receptionist answers real calls. We monitor performance and keep refining.
